heading: Required Access
body:
To enable or disable Performance Advisor and the Query Profiler
for a project, you must have the [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) role for
the project or the [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) role on its parent
organization.

To view query performance in the Query Profiler, you must have
[Project Read Only](<Project Read Only>) or
[Project Observability Viewer](<Project Observability Viewer>) access to the project.
